posts.hook: kimi k3's grades came back a day late, and they're good but not the best
posts.caption: independent benchmarks finally land for moonshot's kimi k3, linus torvalds tells linux's ai critics to fork it or walk, paypal's board says no to a $53b buyout, and mlb bans genai in the dugout. full digest at sift.yasint.dev (link in bio)

slides.title: kimi k3's independent benchmarks finally land
slides.desc: ==2.8t== open model scores near opus 4.8, tops one arena outright

slides.title: claude code now runs a 5-agent review fleet
slides.desc: cloud agents check every internal pr, only high-confidence bugs get flagged

slides.title: linus torvalds to ai coding critics: fork it
slides.desc: backs an ai review tool that catches half of later-fixed kernel bugs

slides.title: germany's soofi s tops open-model benchmarks
slides.desc: 30b sovereign model beats rivals in both english and german

slides.title: paypal's board just said no to a buyout
slides.desc: stripe and advent's ==$53b== bid undervalues the company, sources say

slides.title: trump's teleprompter operator allegedly gamed kalshi
slides.desc: accused of betting on what trump would say before he said it

slides.title: mlb just banned ai in the dugout
slides.desc: a third of teams were using genai iPads for in-game strategy calls
